dashboard.title: Your dashboard is ready
dashboard.description: Connect a gateway or install tracker.js to see your data here.
dashboard.noDataSubtitle: Connect a gateway or install the tracker to see your data

mrr.title: Recurring revenue module
mrr.description: The recurring revenue module will be automatically activated when your first subscription is detected. Connect your Stripe or Asaas to import existing subscriptions.

channels.title: Where does your revenue come from?
channels.description: Install tracker.js with UTMs to see where your revenue comes from. Without UTMs, everything appears as "Direct".

finance.noPaymentsDescription: Connect a payment gateway to import your financial history.
finance.noDataPeriodDescription: There are no payments recorded for the selected period. Try a different date range.
finance.noCostsBanner: Configure costs in Settings → Costs to see your real profit.

costs.ctaLabel: Add your first cost to complete your income statement

pages.title: Which pages convert the most?
pages.description: Install tracker.js to see which landing pages generate the most revenue and conversions.
